name: drawer
title: Drawer
description: A drawer primitive with the upstream tablecn slot and direction contract.

files.content:
<script lang="ts" module>
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import type { Snippet } from "svelte";
	import type { WithoutChildrenOrChild } from "$UTILS$.js";

	export type DrawerDirection = "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left";
	export type DrawerProps = WithoutChildrenOrChild<DialogPrimitive.RootProps> & {
		children?: Snippet;
		direction?: DrawerDirection;
	};
</script>

<script lang="ts">
	import { setDrawerContext } from "./drawer-context.js";

	let { open = $bindable(false), children, direction = "bottom", ...restProps }: DrawerProps = $props();

	const rootProps = $derived(
		{
			"data-slot": "drawer",
			...restProps
		} as DialogPrimitive.RootProps & { "data-slot": string }
	);

	setDrawerContext({
		get direction() {
			return direction;
		}
	});
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Root bind:open {...rootProps}>
	{@render children?.()}
</DialogPrimitive.Root>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "bits-ui";

	let { ref = $bindable(null), ...restProps }: DialogPrimitive.TriggerProps = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Trigger bind:ref data-slot="drawer-trigger" {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "bits-ui";

	let { ref = $bindable(null), ...restProps }: DialogPrimitive.CloseProps = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Close bind:ref data-slot="drawer-close" {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts" module>
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import type { Snippet } from "svelte";

	export type DrawerPortalProps = DialogPrimitive.PortalProps & {
		children?: Snippet;
	};
</script>

<script lang="ts">
	let { children, ...restProps }: DrawerPortalProps = $props();

	const portalProps = $derived(
		{
			"data-slot": "drawer-portal",
			...restProps
		} as DialogPrimitive.PortalProps & { "data-slot": string }
	);
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Portal {...portalProps}>
	{@render children?.()}
</DialogPrimitive.Portal>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn } from "$UTILS$.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: DialogPrimitive.OverlayProps = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Overlay
	bind:ref
	data-slot="drawer-overlay"
	class={cn(
		"data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=open]:fade-in-0 fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/50 data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=open]:animate-in",
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>
{@render children?.()}
{@render children?.()}
{@render children?.()}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn } from "$UTILS$.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: DialogPrimitive.TitleProps = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Title
	bind:ref
	data-slot="drawer-title"
	class={cn("font-semibold text-foreground", className)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn } from "$UTILS$.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: DialogPrimitive.DescriptionProps = $props();
</script>

<DialogPrimitive.Description
	bind:ref
	data-slot="drawer-description"
	class={cn("text-muted-foreground text-sm", className)}
	{...restProps}
/>
